fields.name: code
fields.description:
extra service code, which can take following values

code   | name                                 

 | - 

DSL    | Driver language specified
EWT    | Extra waiting time
MAG    | Meet & Greet
FLM    | Flight monitoring
NWS    | Newspaper
CAI    | Cancellation insurance
WNR    | Wait and Return. Driver waits at destination and brings back the customer to pick-up point

fields.name: isBookable
fields.description: true if extra service is available for booking

fields.name: taxIncluded
fields.description: true if tax included in extra service price

fields.name: includedInTotal
fields.description: true if extra service price is included in total transfer amount
